text:
Fullmetal Alchemist Original Soundtrack 1 is a soundtrack album containing music from Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Tracklist

Main Theme ~The Fullmetal Alchemist (3:42)
Laws of Alchemy (1:27)
Again (TV size) (1:39)
Nightfall in Central City (2:35)
Fire in the Sky (2:25)
Clash of the Alchemists (1:44)
Lurking (1:20)
Mist (2:29)
Spiral of Truth (1:25)
Mortal Sin (2:12) 
One is All, All is One (1:39)
Requiem for the Brigadier General (2:28)
Uso (TV size) (1:30) 
Lullaby of Resembool (2:13) 
Interlude (1:04)
Hologram (TV size) (1:39)
Far East Suite (1:36)
Beneath the City (1:41)
Fifth Laboratory (2:45)
Fanfare for the Brave (1:28)
Trisha's Lullaby (3:31)
Concerto ~Brotherhood~ (2:11)
Hum of the Streets (1:08)
Beyond the Walls (3:38)
Next Chapter (2:28),.
Home ~en route to Resembool~ (1:14)
Lapis Philosophorum (2:58)
Happiness ~Requiem from The Blind Alchemist~ (2:04)
Home ~a house on the hill~ (2:03)
Overture ~Brotherhood~ (2:16)
LET IT OUT (TV size) (1:31)

Notes

Music composed, scored, and arranged by Akira Senju WARSAW RECORDING SESSION (1, 2, 4-6, 8, 10, 12, 17-22, 24, 25, 27, 30) Conducted by Mario Klemens (1, 2, 4-6, 8, 10, 12, 17-22, 24, 27, 30) & Akira Senju (25) Orchestra & Choir: Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Choir Recording & Editing: Andrzej Sasin, Aleksandra Nagórko for CD Accord Recorded at Warsaw Philharmonic Hall & Studio (Filharmonia Narodowa), Sound and More Studio, Warsaw, Poland on February 18 to 21, & June 11 & 12, 2009 Manager of the Recording: Wojciech Nowak Orchestra inspector: Tadeusz Boniecki
Track 3 Composer, Performer, Lyricist: YUI Arrangement: Hisashi Kondo Guitar: R'dh+
Track 13 Composition by Yuuya Arrangement by SID, Akira Nishihira Performed by SID, Chieko Kinbara Strings Lyrics by mao
Track 16 Lyrics & Composition: Tatsuya Mitsumura Arrangement: Seiji Kameda, NICO Touches the Walls
Track 31 Composition: Miho Fukuhara, Hiroo Yamaguchi Arrangement: Hyoe Yasuhara Performed by Susumu Nishikawa, Hiroo Yamaguchi (bass), Yu-ki Nakamura (drums), Hyoe Yasuhara (programming and other instruments) Lyrics by Miho Fukuhara
TOKYO RECORDING SESSION (7, 9, 11, 14, 15, 23, 26, 28, 29) Conducted by Akira Senju Strings: Masatsugu Shinozaki Strings Piano & Celesta: Haruki Mino Guitar, Portuguese Guitar & Mandolin: Koichiro Tashiro Flute & Alto Flute: Mitsuru Sohma Harp: Tomoyuki Asakawa Manipulator: Takafumi Wada Recorded & Mixed by Toshiyuki Yoshida Recorded and Mixed at Victor Studio, Tokyo Japan, on January 29, March 4, 2009
